# Sample Input

Project: Volunteer workshop signup refresh

Context:
A neighborhood education group wants to improve how participants sign up for free Saturday workshops.

Goal:
Reduce signup confusion and make it easier for participants to confirm attendance.

Constraints:
- non-commercial internal use
- one operator owns the BA work
- lightweight markdown outputs only

Notes:
- current signup happens through email and spreadsheet updates
- participants often miss the schedule confirmation
- program coordinators want a clearer flow before the next workshop cycle
